Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Testament]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Testament is a ship with sails made of membranous green skin that resemble bat's wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Testament is a ship that Calder Marten repaired using three hundred planks of wood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Testament is a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Testament is a ship that can come to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Testament is the name of Calder's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Testament is a vessel or location with cabins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Calder works on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Testament is a ship that serves as an escape option.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — The Testament has a work site.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Testament is an Awakened ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Testament is the fastest ship in the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Testament is an object whose shadow looms over the characters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Testament is a vessel with a hold containing barrels, crates, and bundles of cargo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — The Testament is a ship intended to be pulled by an Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — The Testament is almost finished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Calder has tools disguised as materials from The Testament hidden in his carriage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Urzaia Woodsman is the official cook aboard the Navigator vessel known as The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder is the captain of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri failed to persuade Calder to steal The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Testament is expected to make landfall soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Testament is a ship with green-veined sails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament is an object the Blackwatch aims to use to summon something capable of dragging a ship through the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament is a dark green ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament is a ship that has wooden scaffolding surrounding it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament's sails are made of greenish skin with pulsing veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Testament is a Blackwatch ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Testament is a destination or entity mentioned by Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Testament is a structure equipped with cannons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Testament is a vessel that carries crewmen and prisoners.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Testament is a place where Shera spends her first night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Testament is a vessel that docks at the docks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Testament is a location that Gardeners could depopulate.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The Testament is an object Calder tried to tip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — The group has taken The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Testament is a ship that is currently stuffed to the brim with salvaged cargo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The Testament is Calder Marten's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Testament is an artifact mentioned by Cheska.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder uses Reading to hold The Testament together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder's clothes were carried over from The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Testament is a ship Calder intends to use to flee.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Testament is a boat that never stops moving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The Testament is a ship that an Inquisitor could be sneaked into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Testament is a ship whose crew was taken prisoner by the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Testament is a ship that thirteen people used to leave Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Petal is aboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Testament is a construction that the Emperor has invested thousands of goldmarks into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Testament is a vessel that Jorin could sink.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament has a railing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Testament is a force that can be capsized like a crashing wave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament is a vessel with sails.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Testament has a crew of at least three members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera faced the entire crew of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament is a ship leading the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament has green-veined sails and chains attached to an Elder monstrosity.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Testament is an item that a Soulbound cannot bring into a meeting room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Calder ran back to The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder wears clothes similar to what he would wear aboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The Testament is a ship that Foster is attempting to bring close to shore.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Testament is a vessel with waves lapping against it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Testament is a ship that Dalton Foster has a cabin on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — The Testament is a vessel that picks up Foster in the shallow Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The group plans to get aboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Testament is a ship that responds to Calder's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament is a structure or location near the harbor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament is a location Calder hurries back to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Testament is a ship that emits a pure light from its deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The arrival of The Testament was considered a godsend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Testament is a ship in the fleet that has no passengers, only crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Testament is a location where people can look up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Testament is a ship that was half a wreck.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten might have worn clothes appropriate for a ship's deck aboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Testament is tied to a monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera and Calder first met on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Testament is being pulled forward by an Elder creature below the ocean's surface.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
